“他被我打了一巴掌，三天过去...可曾知错？”
“陛下！帝夫他，他跑了！”
“什么！？”
女帝慌了...
白衣少年，玉剑公子，风度翩翩，游戏人间~
莫不是前路无知己，只怕这深宫困自由！
我！白玉仙！撤了先~","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8ee3cb6862df2019199009e99c9d3d04~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清水醉龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7200319217843833908","book_name":"启禀女帝，帝夫他又双叒叕跑了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7202100098753364491","read_count":"996","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"132381"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.2","serial_count":"64","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,东方玄幻,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8ee3cb6862df2019199009e99c9d3d04~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253594&x-signature=oRAMtgnKoUh3iK8EJaHoIhtq%2F8w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1978752548739054","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.149911e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211306346AFCCB04CA8737DE6168"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1768,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9917,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2544},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384076831878546238","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点烂尾了，但是总体上来说还可以，剧情挺有意思的
有一点就是，大部分读者不怎么喜欢刀子（我是这么认为的），我感觉后面十三个魔影那一段挺难受的，作者大大其实可以搞个转折或者外传的
还有一点，剧情好看但是有点短（希望作者不会这么短awa）结尾其实还可以再多写一点，比如仙域神域，或者穿插几个一千年后的分支，再不济也可以把那几个女主抢男主的剧情多写点
前面没补的坑挺多的，就比如男主的身世还有堕龙（不记得名字了）与男主之间的关系
但是，总体来说还是很不错的，作者大大继续加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719241583,"group_id":"7200319217843833908","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzdv5o8bA3IWAOqSZc6qxJnj5BC371MU4OOQQOTsL4IN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0e130f6d2423474cb449d99a62b1392b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618014&x-signature=Hf6pMuDMSBynQCdk%2BhRYhQ2hH6Q%3D","user_id":"4251180309164458","user_name":"EXIST乄陌陌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4251180309164458","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7200319217843833908","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻】+【原创】+【轻松】+【搞笑】+【爽文】
